inline_comments.message:
"env" setting is not a supported option when blueprints are generated through automated tools (spec->bp-gen process) hence this should be avoided.

App configuration should follow below override priority
1) via CBS/Consul
2) If CBS query fails/unsupported, use env (which is primarily required on standalone docker deploy only, not on blueprint). When application is deployed on blueprint, rest of platform availability is a pre-requisite.
3) If no env defined, use container defaults.
